# Wands
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Wands&prop=wikitext


'''Wands''' are used by the [[Priest]], and the [[Sorcerer]]
==Production {{PAGENAME}}==
'''''For production {{PAGENAME}} please follow this '''''[https://www.realmeye.com/wiki/wands link]

==Custom {{PAGENAME}}==
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Wand Full of Mana|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Wand of the Rising Star|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|The Winged Wand|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Realm Power|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Radiant Wand of Royalism|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Wand of the Frozen Queen|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Wand of Bone|p}}
| {{ItemDisplay|The Apex Bulwark|p}}
|}
===Starforce {{PAGENAME}}===
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Celestial Caduceus|g}}
|}
